title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING YEARLY SEVEN MILLION PESOS FROM THE NET PROFITS OF THE CENTRAL BANK PAID INTO THE GENERAL FUND OF THE GOVERNMENT TO FORM PART OF THE REVOLVING RURAL BANKS TRUST FUND.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4778 / 57 OG No. 2, 219 (January 9, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2702, June 18, 1960 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING YEARLY SEVEN MILLION PESOS FROM THE NET PROFITS OF THE CENTRAL BANK PAID INTO THE GENERAL FUND OF THE GOVERNMENT TO FORM PART OF THE REVOLVING RURAL BANKS TRUST FUND.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Provided, however,

That, in the grant or disposition of the government capital assistance, Priority shall be given to newly organized rural banks.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1960.
